context: Agent must introduce an interface at the boundary between a high-level module and a low-level module and invert the dependency direction

checklist.name: INotifier interface produced
checklist.description: INotifier.ts exists and exports an interface with a notify method (or equivalent) returning Promise<void>

checklist.name: EmailNotifier implements INotifier
checklist.description: The updated EmailNotifier.ts declares 'implements INotifier' in its class signature

checklist.name: OrderProcessor accepts INotifier via constructor
checklist.description: The refactored OrderProcessor.ts has a constructor parameter typed to INotifier

checklist.name: OrderProcessor does not import EmailNotifier
checklist.description: OrderProcessor.ts contains no import of EmailNotifier anywhere

checklist.name: dip-analysis.md explains the violation
checklist.description: dip-analysis.md identifies that OrderProcessor (high-level) depended on EmailNotifier (low-level concrete), violating DIP

checklist.name: dip-analysis.md explains the fix
checklist.description: dip-analysis.md explains that both modules now depend on the INotifier abstraction, with EmailNotifier implementing it and OrderProcessor consuming it
